title: Organic Next To Me Crib Sheets – Gots Certified Thickest & Softest GOTS Organic Cotton 200GSM – Bedside Sleeper Sheet 51x85 / 50x90 Next2me Cozee Bedside Crib Fitted Mattress Sheets
features: TOUCH IT · FEEL IT · COMPARE You’ll notice the difference instantly. Most baby sheets look fine online, but in real life they’re shockingly thin almost see-through which means your baby is lying directly against the synthetic mattress or protector underneath. Thin sheets trap heat, feel plasticky, and offer no comfort layer during the 14 - 16 hours a day babies spend sleeping. That’s why thickness and breathability matter far more than most parents realise. Bunnyjik sheets are crafted from luxuriously thick 200gsm organic Turkish cotton, creating a truly soft, breathable comfort layer noticeably thicker than typical baby sheets sold today.
SIZE : Size: Set of 2 next to me crib sheets Compatible with many other bedside cribs / cots. Compatible with many bedisde cribs, It will fit any matresses by 51x85cm / 50x90cm / 83 x 50 cm.

CERTIFIED ORGANIC COTTON : We use only GOTS certified organic cotton, Licence No. 1139680 — verifiable at global-standard.org. the world’s most trusted standard for organic textiles. No pesticides. No synthetics. No harsh dyes. Pure from farm to finish.
WHY WE MADE THIS ; Plush, substantial organic cotton that cocoons your baby’s skin in softness. Naturally breathable and absorbent, thick enough to wick moisture away for calm, undisturbed sleep.

SLIGHTLY OVERSIZED FOR A PERFECT FI : This next to me sheets cut with a little extra room to allow gentle, natural shrinkage after the first wash. Once washed and tumble dried, the sheets settle into their true size and reveal a luxuriously soft, cloud like feel.

BEYOND ORDINARY COZIER. THICKER. SOFTER : These sheets for next to me crib Made from 200gsm double knit organic cotton, almost twice as thick as standard crib sheets. Designed for long lasting softness, durability, and comfort.

MEET THE MAKERS : Responsibly crafted in Turkey using Turkish cotton prized for its long, silky fibers that create an exceptionally soft yet durable weave. Each sheet is made with care, integrity, and generations of craftsmanship.
description: Product Description It Starts With Better Cotton. It Ends With a Better Sleep. MADE IN TURKEY: Authentic Turkish organic cotton prized for its purity, softness, and strength, cultivated for centuries in the Aegean sun, grown for generations, and woven with integrity untouched by mass production. " A Hug That Lasts All Night " 200gsm double-knit organic cotton, plush enough to soothe, strong enough to last. Eliminate harmful chemicals by going organic! Many baby sheets on the market are made with polyester/syntehtic blends or treated with finishes that may contain potentially harmful chemicals. These substances can come into contact with your baby’s delicate skin or release unwanted residues into the air they breathe. Choosing certified organic (with verified Licence number) , you avoid unnecessary exposure and give your baby a cleaner, safer sleep environment. With Bunnyjik , you get every sheet is made from certified organic cotton. Thicker. Softer. Truly Organic. "The Weight of Real Quality" Why? Because you're not just buying a sheet.
